publishedAbstract: After following various solution articles and product documentation steps, there is now a need to open a BugZilla case and provide Engineering with all the necessary logs needed for analysis. This solution aims to decrease the back-and-forth time between the customer, Support, and Engineering with the goal of streamlining response to the customer by providing Engineering with all of the data that is needed for assessment. **NOTE:** This solution is a one-time capture of the current/previous state of CephFS/MDSs. In the event there is an issue still ongoing and the MDSs are in a state where issues such as Slow Requests, Slow Metadata IOs, Failed to Respond to Cache Pressure, Failed to Respond to Cability Releases, etc. are intermittently appearing, a continual data collection script may need to be executed to catch the issues as they appear. Please see the steps outlined in the [Ceph Data Capture Scripts in Red Hat OpenShift Data Foundation (RHODF)](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7041409) for more information.
publishedTitle: Ceph MDS Troubleshooting - Gather All of the Necessary Logs/Data - OpenShift Data Foundations
